view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided confirms that multiple customers have successfully booked the same offer, with each booking having a distinct status and payment details. Specifically, the bookings for 'customer one' and 'customer two' show that each participant's payment status is tracked individually, fulfilling the requirement for a shared booking record with per-person payment status. The evidence from the 'customer-book-primary' and 'customer-two-concurrent' steps demonstrates this clearly.
